title: Workflow for Handling Missing Data
description: A decision flowchart illustrating the process of identifying, analyzing, and addressing missing values in a dataset during Exploratory Data Analysis.
elements: Analyze Pattern & Mechanism of Missingness (MCAR, MAR, MNAR)
Decide on Strategy: Deletion vs. Imputation
relationships: Process flows sequentially from Load Dataset to Re-evaluate Dataset
Analyze Pattern leads to the decision point for Strategy
Decision point branches into two paths: Deletion and Imputation
